content:
- globs: *.html *.css
+ globs: *.html, *.css
Make simple layout using modern htmll and css best practices
Make sure the layout is responsive

- description: Creating frontend html and css files
+ description: Rule for editing and creating UI with HTML, CSS and JS

- # Styling
+ # General

- Make simple layout using modern htmll and css best practices
+ Make simple layout using modern html and css best practices

- Make sure the layout is responsive
+ Make sure the layout is responsive

- use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for styling, do not inline styles in html files
+ Use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for styling
Do NOT inline styles in html files

- Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use as much as possible and not create duplicates
+ Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use as much as possible and not create duplicates

- Use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for styling
+ Use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for global styling (colors, common button styling, other re-usable components)

- Do NOT inline styles in html files
+ Do NOT inline styles
For component (html page) specific styling use <style> tag to keep it simple, but make it easy to move to dedicated css file

- Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use as much as possible and not create duplicates
+ Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use existing styles to keep the UI consistent and not create duplicates

- description: Rule for editing and creating UI with HTML, CSS and JS
+ description: Changing and creating UI with HTML, CSS and JS

- Use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for global styling (colors, common button styling, other re-usable components)
+ Use [style.css](mdc:src/static/css/style.css) for styling

- Do NOT inline styles
+ Do NOT inline styles in html files
For component (html page) specific styling use <style> tag to keep it simple, but make it easy to move to dedicated css file

- Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use existing styles to keep the UI consistent and not create duplicates
+ Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use as much as possible and not create duplicates

For component-specific styles place them directly in the .html file

- Make sure to use consistent styling, re-use as much as possible and not create duplicates
